news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical's commercial paper rated IND A1 by India Ratings.
The affirmed rating applies to a ₹100 crore commercial paper issuance.
news.summary:

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical repaid Rs. 100 Crore CP on 4 Mar 2026 as per issuance terms.
Disclosure follows SEBI Master Circular; details available on www.himadri.com.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical begins commercial operations of specialty carbon black at Mahistikry plant, adding 70,000 MTPA capacity.
The company's total carbon black capacity has now reached 2,50,000 MTPA.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical begins commercial operations of specialty carbon black at Mahistikry plant, adding 70,000 MTPA capacity.
The company's total carbon black capacity has now reached 2,50,000 MTPA.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd completed acquisition of 100% equity in Himadri Power Ltd.
The transaction, worth INR 2.5 lakh, makes Himadri Power Ltd a wholly-owned subsidiary from 11 Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd completed acquisition of 100% equity in Himadri Power Ltd.
The transaction, worth INR 2.5 lakh, makes Himadri Power Ltd a wholly-owned subsidiary from 11 Feb 2026.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical acquired 100% equity of Himadri Power for INR 2.5 lakh.
This acquisition makes Himadri Power a wholly-owned subsidiary, entering mineral mining.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical acquired 100% equity of Himadri Power for INR 2.5 lakh.
This acquisition makes Himadri Power a wholly-owned subsidiary, entering mineral mining.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd (HSCL) announced its Q3 & 9M FY26 financial results, highlighting a 41% YoY PAT growth for 9M FY26 and achieving PAT exceeding FY25 levels. The company commenced trial production for its expanded speciality carbon black facility, now the world's largest single-site plant with 130,000 MTPA capacity.
HSCL achieved significant milestones, including commissioning a Mangalore port terminal for coal tar pitch exports and securing EcoVadis platinum sustainability rating. Promoter shareholding increased to 52.5% post warrant conversion. The company is on track with its lithium-ion phosphate cathode material facility, targeting full capacity by FY29.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd (HSCL) announced its Q3 & 9M FY26 financial results, highlighting a 41% YoY PAT growth for 9M FY26 and achieving PAT exceeding FY25 levels. The company commenced trial production for its expanded speciality carbon black facility, now the world's largest single-site plant with 130,000 MTPA capacity.
HSCL achieved significant milestones, including commissioning a Mangalore port terminal for coal tar pitch exports and securing EcoVadis platinum sustainability rating. Promoter shareholding increased to 52.5% post warrant conversion. The company is on track with its lithium-ion phosphate cathode material facility, targeting full capacity by FY29.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical plans to fund growth via internal accruals.
The company rules out equity dilution or new debt for future expansion.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical plans to fund growth via internal accruals.
The company rules out equity dilution or new debt for future expansion.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical's anthraquinone and carbazole facility set for Q2 FY27.
Coal tar pitch distillation debottling to ramp up in 2-3 quarters; full results by Q1 FY27.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical's anthraquinone and carbazole facility set for Q2 FY27.

news.title:
Himadri's 40,000 MT LFP cathode plant is on track for Q3 FY27.
Significant utilization is expected by FY29 with over 2x asset turn.
news.summary:

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical expects 85% capacity utilization for its specialty carbon black expansion project next year.
Management forecasts capacity utilization to rise to 95-100% in subsequent years.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical expects 85% capacity utilization for its specialty carbon black expansion project next year.

The call was held on 21 Jan 2026 at 4:30 PM IST; details on www.himadri.com.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical starts talks with global buyers for Li-ion battery components.
Its ₹1,130 cr Odisha plant, producing lithium iron phosphate, is set to commission by year-end.
news.summary:

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical begins trial production at expanded Mahistikry facility.
The facility's capacity rises to 130,000 MTPA, becoming the world's largest single-site carbon black plant.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical begins trial production at expanded Mahistikry facility.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Q3 net profit rose 37.3% YoY to ₹1.95B from ₹1.42B.
Revenue was stable at ₹11.33B compared to ₹11.32B YoY.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Q3 net profit rose 37.3% YoY to ₹1.95B from ₹1.42B.
Revenue was stable at ₹11.33B compared to ₹11.32B YoY.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical's 9MFY26 PAT reached Rs. 564 Cr, surpassing FY25.
Revenue steady at Rs. 3303.8 Cr; EBITDA up 19%, PAT up 41% YoY for 9MFY26.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical's 9MFY26 PAT reached Rs. 564 Cr, surpassing FY25.
Revenue steady at Rs. 3303.8 Cr; EBITDA up 19%, PAT up 41% YoY for 9MFY26.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd invested AUD 37.03K in Sicona Battery Technologies, raising its holding to 1.42M CCNs.
The investment, made via CCNs, does not grant additional voting rights or control in Sicona at present.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd invested AUD 37.03K in Sicona Battery Technologies, raising its holding to 1.42M CCNs.
The investment, made via CCNs, does not grant additional voting rights or control in Sicona at present.

news.title:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd's board will meet on 16 Jan 2026 to approve unaudited results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 2025.
Trading window closure from 1 Jan 2026 will reopen 48 hours after results announcement as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd's board will meet on 16 Jan 2026 to approve unaudited results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 2025.
Trading window closure from 1 Jan 2026 will reopen 48 hours after results announcement as per SEBI norms.
